title: Gooey Middle Eastern Dum Stir-fry
description: A unique and indulgent date-night dish featuring a gooey texture with hints of bitterness and light rum for an exotic twist. Gluten-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: Light Rum
ingredients.notes: For a touch of sweetness and depth.

ingredients.name: Date-Nut Sauce
ingredients.notes: Use a pre-made or homemade sauce for flavor enhancement.

instructions: Heat oil in a wok over medium heat. Add onion and garlic, cook until soft.
Add cumin powder, cardamom pods, and red chili flakes; stir-fry for 1 minute.
Push the vegetables to one side of the wok, add rum on the other side and let it simmer for about 30 seconds.
Mix the dum with the veggie mixture. Add date-nut sauce and cook until fully heated through.
